title: [Cobblemon] Fai's Mythical Monstrosities
description:
Welcome to a world of mythical monstrosities!
This project brings folklore and legends to life through Fakemon inspired by myths, curses, and old stories!💫
body:
# Fai's Mythical Monstrosities A Cobblemon addon with folklore inspired Fakemon, strange moon events, rituals, new forms, and a bit of weird magic.! It adds **Fakemon**, **forms**, **lunar evolutions**, **signature moves**, **abilities**, items, blocks, and a few event systems. A lot of the mod is tied to moon events, which can affect spawns, evolutions, the world, and some battles.! The mod is still in **alpha**, so bugs and changes are expected. Things may be reworked, balanced, renamed, or expanded as I keep working on it. <3 [Plans](https://trello.com/b/CyGyjn1p/fais-mythical-monstrosities) [Issue Tracker](https://github.com/fai-xi/fais-mythical-monstrosities-issues) [Suggestions Repo](https://github.com/fai-xi/fais-mythical-monstrosities-suggestions) --- ## Requirements **Minecraft:** 1.21.1 **Loader:** Fabric **Dependencies:** Fabric API + Cobblemon 1.7.1+ **Recommended Shaders:** Complementary Reimagined **Recommended:** JEI for recipes --- # Information ## Core Event Systems ### Lunar Events The mod currently has three lunar events: Blood Moon Blue Moon Harvest Moon They only start at night by using Stardais. Only one lunar event can be active in a world at a time, and their timing/cooldowns can be changed in the config. --- ### Blood Moon
Effects The Blood Moon turns the sky crimson, changes the moon, adds red spore particles, and brings out special Blood Moon spawns. While it is active, some wild spawns can have better shiny odds, certain evolutions become possible, and eligible defeated species can drop Blood Moon loot like bloodstone, gemstones, and related items. Cobblemon battles can also detect **bloodmoon weather** during the event.
--- ### Blue Moon
Effects The Blue Moon adds **Blue Moon battle weather** and gives nearby players water-themed buffs like **Night Vision**, **Dolphin's Grace**, faster swimming, and sometimes **Conduit Power** in rain. Aquatic mobs can get **Water Breathing**, fish or glow squid may appear near water, and light frost can show up on grass at night. It also adds Cobblemon bonuses like extra shiny rolls, friendship boosts, and special spawn chances. Special: Can be called by Selyn.
--- ### Harvest Moon
Effects The Harvest Moon helps crops grow around players, including Cobblemon berries and apricorns. It also keeps nearby farmland hydrated. Players can get small support effects, mobs and Pokemon may drop extra harvest loot, and defeating enemies can sometimes give short **Regeneration**. Bonus drops can include crops, apricorns, berries, and other farming items.
--- ### Shared Lunar Rules Only one lunar event can be active at once. Events only happen at night and end when their timer runs out or daytime starts. Cooldowns scale based on how many players are online. Event state is saved per world and synced to clients. --- ## Pokemon, Forms, and Event Species ### Magipole ![magipole](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f20c2c91164899753b2035e55df5827715e6e49c.png) *A gentle lilypad Fakemon that hops around wetlands and shallow water.*
How to obtain Spawns in swamp wetlands, rainy rivers, and forest or jungle fishing pools. It usually favors wet weather.
--- ### Thaumatoad ![thaumatoadicon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fc0e7e2861b3274d17d1c6b0f1fb586ac157afff.png) *A calm little witch toad.*
How to obtain Evolve Magipole with a **Leaf Stone**. Wild Thaumatoad can also appear in rainy swamp pools.
--- ### Lootoad ![Lootoad](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5cf56e546bd53d5cacf0c47788633e2a05205af6.png) *A scavenger toad Fakemon that likes stealing, trading, and causing problems.*
How to obtain Evolve Magipole with a **Shiny Stone**. Wild Lootoad appears in rainy Overworld routes, swamp nights, riverbanks, and dripstone caves.
--- ### Bloodsplitter ![Bloodsplitter](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f4190aafdde4055c29fb71ebf674c82f70ac10f1.png) *The Blood Moon twists Ariados into a darker, more dangerous form.*
How to obtain Level up Ariados during a Blood Moon while it holds a **Bloodstone**. Wild Bloodsplitter can appear in dark forests at night.
--- ### Faylure ![Faylure](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/551eef5b402e70636dd5cfc15ad09692c9bda655.png) *A nightmare-like spirit tied to crimson moonlight.*
How to obtain Level up **Phantump Blossom** during a Blood Moon while it holds a **Bloodstone**. Wild Faylure appears in cherry and floral night pools, including BYG cherry blossom forests when BYG is installed.
--- ### Chrysopierce ![Chrysopierceandshiny](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5712576d2ed089570e5e6c8cf090e8b8c30dbb30.png) *A graceful duelist Fakemon with sharp, focused attacks.*
How to obtain Evolve Charcadet with a **Dawn Stone**. Wild Chrysopierce appears in high-level Overworld and Nether pools, Badlands day spawns, and rare night spawns. Aether spawns are also included when Aether is installed.
--- ### Harpivoir ![Harpivoir](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6c6360f3c4464e79624eb976e336540de34493b9_0.webp) *A night hunter that copies familiar voices to lure people in.*
How to obtain Use a **Harpy Lyre** on Gardevoir at night while it holds a **Dusk Stone** and has high friendship. Wild Harpivoir appears in forest and floral night pools, with extra rainy-night forest spawns.
--- ### Scryu ![Scryu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d5db2699eadccebeb5ed75503822ee1fa5a59181.png) *A moon-sensitive seer Fakemon tied to rituals and lunar progress.*
How to obtain Appears at night in floating Overworld sky spawns, with extra mountain-night routes and rare End spawns.
--- ### Selyn ![Selyn](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/efb4349e7855f715bb0a0b799d1fce81fa9666bf.png) *A celestial Fakemon tied to the Moon Temple and lunar events.*
How to obtain Appears at the custom **Moon Temple** structure, including a rare high-level night spawn there.
--- ### Unown Zodiac *Celestial-themed Unowns. Right now, only Libra is included.*
How to obtain Spawns at night across Overworld astral and hidden routes, plus rare End spawns.
--- ### Phantump Blossom ![PhantumpBlossom](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a1a551c7408a328287a9790eaf9685647a641461.png) *A cherry blossom Phantump variant that glows faintly under moonlight.*
How to obtain Spawns at night in cherry grove and floral forest pools, including BYG cherry blossom forest routes when BYG is installed.
--- ### Trevenant Blossom ![TrevenantBlossom](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0622415b676e4e1bc68ba2813936057526d850f7_0.webp) *A haunting blossom Trevenant said to lead wanderers deeper into the forest.*
How to obtain Trade-evolve Phantump Blossom, or find it in cherry and floral night pools, including BYG cherry blossom forest routes.
--- ### Tinkaton Draconic ![TinkatonDraconic](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3a9b105c16dea30f87bcb95d214c33315807fa9d.png) *A draconic Tinkaton form that fights with heavy pressure and momentum.*
How to obtain Spawns in high mountain routes, windswept peaks, mountain caves, and rare End highlands or midlands spawns. BYG and Terralith mountain variants are supported when those mods are installed.
--- ### Milotic Bloodmoon ![MiloticBloodmoon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ca6a96408076a33b34c8fb963e868fb5520af4bc.png) *A Blood Moon Milotic variant that rises under crimson moonlight.*
How to obtain Level up Milotic during a Blood Moon while it holds a **Bloodstone**.
--- ### Bloodmoon Sableye ![SableyeBloodmoon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9cd51ae29f76ca12ec1fdfae5c65c8d0228388c3_0.webp) *A darker Sableye variant powered by Blood Moon energy.*
How to obtain Evolve **Sableye** during a **Blood Moon** while it holds a **Bloodstone**.
--- ## Abilities
Thaumaturgy Signature of: Thaumatoad This Pokemon's moves ignore opposing Ability effects. It also cannot be statused, flinched, or Taunted.
Predator Signature of: Harpivoir Damaging hits mark the target as prey. The next damaging hit on that marked target is boosted to 1.5x power. The mark goes away after the boosted hit, or when the target switches out.
Face Collector Signature of: Bloodsplitter Bloodsplitter starts battle with a face active. While the face is active, the first damaging move that hits it does 0 damage. After Bloodsplitter gets a KO, the face is restored.
Duelist's Dance Signature of: Chrysopierce Gives its attacks a very high crit stage. The crit damage is custom-tuned so it stays more controlled.
Deathblossom Signature of: Blossom Phantump line If it is at full HP, it survives a fatal hit at 1 HP. The attacker is then put to Sleep and seeded with Leech Seed.
Essence Reforge Signature of: Tinkaton Draconic Physical attacks target Special Defense instead of Defense. KOs on Dragon or Fairy targets give Speed boosts.
Abyssal Elegy Signature of: Milotic Bloodmoon This Pokemon's attacks always hit. Incoming sound-based moves fail against it.
Celestial Signature of: Unown Zodiacs Doubles Attack, Defense, Special Attack, Special Defense, and Speed while active.
Moonmaiden Edict Signature of: Selyn On switch in, sets Blue Moon weather if it is not already active.
Oompy Goompy Signature of: Lootoad Cancels the effect of opposing stat boosts while Lootoad is active. If hit by a contact move while it has no held item, it steals the attacker's held item.
--- ## Moves
Helios Blade Signature of: Chrysopierce A 2-hit priority Fire move. Each hit has a small chance to burn, paralyze, or flinch. After using it, the user drops its own Defense and Special Defense by 1 stage.
Gigaton Excalibur Signature of: Tinkaton Draconic A 160 base power Dragon attack that ignores Fairy immunity. It cannot be used twice in a row.
Bloodcall Learned by: Blood Moon forms Sets Blood Moon weather in battle.
Dreadcurrent Signature of: Milotic Bloodmoon A 75 base power Special Water move that traps the target in a current for 3 turns. While the current is active, it deals damage and heals the user by that amount.
Bog Omen Signature of: Thaumatoad Applies a 3-turn seal. While sealed, the target's Ability is suppressed, priority moves are blocked, and stat boost attempts fail.
Umbral Flurry Signature of: Harpivoir A 3-hit priority Dark move that only works on the user's first active turn. Hits after the first are weaker.
Blue Moon Edict Learned by: Blue Moon forms Sets Blue Moon weather in battle.
Azure Decree Signature of: Selyn A 20 base power Special Water move. If the user is holding Blue Gemstone, the damage is heavily boosted. During Blue Moon weather, it also gives the user +1 Attack and +1 Special Attack after use.
Rolly Polly Signature of: Lootoad A 95 base power Physical Ground move that needs a held item to use. On hit, the held item is used up. The move's power and extra effect depend on the item. **Examples of item outcomes:** **Choice Band / Scarf / Specs:** gives Attack, Speed, or Special Defense boosts. **Life Orb:** chips the user and gives an Attack boost. **Assault Vest / Eviolite:** gives a Defense boost. **Leftovers / Black Sludge:** heals the user. **Rocky Helmet:** deals extra recoil-like damage to the target. **Air Balloon:** gives Magnet Rise. **Weakness Policy:** gives +2 Attack. **King's Rock / Razor Fang / Hard Stone / Soft Sand:** tries to flinch the target. **Flame Orb / Toxic Orb:** tries to burn or badly poison the target. **Focus Sash / Focus Band:** gives Endure. **Berries:** cure status or heal, depending on the berry group. **Seeds, Gems, Plates, Memories, Drives, Z items, and Mega Stones:** give stat boosts.
--- ## Blue Moon Battle Weather ### Blue Moon **Description:** Under Blue Moon, Psychic-types gain 1.3x boost in their defenses and Ice-type moves are stronger by 1.3x, and Water-types heal a little each turn. --- ## Blood Moon Battle Weather ### Blood Moon **Description:** Blood Moon weather boosts Ghost, Dark, and Psychic attacks while weakening Fairy and Fighting types. **Additional:** Bloodmoon move deals normal/dark damage under Blood Moon weather. --- ## Items ### Bloodstone Bloodstones are used for Blood Moon evolutions and Bloodmoon rituals.. ### Bloodstone Ore Generates deep underground in deepslate layers. --- ## Lunar Gemstones ### Blood Gemstone Used to invoke **Blood Moon** at Stardais. **Recipe:** | | | | |---|---|---| | | Moon Stone | | | Firmanent Shard | Bloodstone | Firmanent Shard | | Gold Ingot | Gold Ingot | Gold Ingot | Yields **1x Blood Gemstone**. --- ### Blue Gemstone Used to invoke **Blue Moon** at Stardais. **Recipe:** | | | | |---|---|---| | | Moon Stone | | | Firmanent Shard | Prismarine Shard | Firmanent Shard | | Gold Ingot | Gold Ingot | Gold Ingot | Yields **1x Blue Gemstone**. --- ### Harvest Gemstone Used to invoke **Harvest Moon** at Stardais. **Recipe:** | | | | |---|---|---| | | Moon Stone | | | Firmanent Shard | Wheat | Firmanent Shard | | Gold Ingot | Gold Ingot | Gold Ingot | Yields **1x Harvest Gemstone**. --- ### Harpy Feather A throwable feather used for Harpy Lyre crafting. **Recipe:** | | | | |---|---|---| | Feather | Black Dye | Feather | | Black Dye | Dusk Stone | Black Dye | | Feather | Black Dye | Feather | Yields **1x Harpy Feather**. --- ### Firmanent Shard A shard of light fallen from the night sky. Used for Stardais Altars and lunar gemstone recipes. This does not have a normal crafting recipe right now. It can fall during night in the Overworld, and Selyn can also give one through interaction. --- ### Harpy Lyre A ritual instrument used to evolve Gardevoir into Harpivoir. **Recipe:** | | | | |---|---|---| | Harpy Feather | Gold Ingot | Harpy Feather | | Gold Ingot | Note Block | Gold Ingot | | Harpy Feather | Dusk Stone | Harpy Feather | Yields **1x Harpy Lyre**. Can be used on Pokemon when Harpivoir is out. --- ## Blocks and World Content ### Bloodstone Ore, Bloodstone Block, Blood Gemstone Block Bloodstone Ore spawns deep underground. Breaking it drops **Bloodstone**, or the ore itself with Silk Touch. **Blood Gemstone Block recipe:** | | | | |---|---|---| | Blood Gemstone | Blood Gemstone | Blood Gemstone | | Blood Gemstone | Blood Gemstone | Blood Gemstone | | Blood Gemstone | Blood Gemstone | Blood Gemstone | Yields **1x Blood Gemstone Block**. Bloodstone Block is in the mod, but it does not have a normal crafting recipe right now. ### Magilily A lilypad block tied to Magipole. It does not have a normal crafting recipe. You can get it by using shears on Magipole. ### Stardais Altars (Aurelia, Luminara, Nocturna) Three altar variants used for lunar gemstone rituals. They are the main interaction point for activating lunar events. **Stardais Aurelia recipe:** | | | | |---|---|---| | | Yellow Dye | | | Firmanent Shard | Moon Stone | Firmanent Shard | | | Purple Dye | | Yields **1x Stardais Aurelia**. **Stardais Luminara recipe:** | | | | |---|---|---| | | White Dye | | | Firmanent Shard | Moon Stone | Firmanent Shard | | | Purple Dye | | Yields **1x Stardais Luminara**. **Stardais Nocturna recipe:** | | | | |---|---|---| | | White Dye | | | Firmanent Shard | Moon Stone | Firmanent Shard | | | Black Dye | | Yields **1x Stardais Nocturna**. --- ## Myth Ball A custom Poke Ball with a catch bonus for certain species. It gives a **4.5x catch rate multiplier** to the fakemons of this mod and any bloodmoon minibosses from this mod.
How to obtain ![myth ball recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d9034c47508f52b7227a69afb380cf15febb0a58.png) **Recipe:** | | | | |---|---|---| | | White Apricorn | | | Red Apricorn | Harpy Feather | Black Apricorn | | | Black Apricorn | | Yields **1x Myth Ball**. Still alpha, so this may change later.
--- Everything here can change while the mod is still in alpha.
